templates.name: Legal • Realistic Corporate (Recommended)
templates.description: Photoreal / corporate documentary look. Best default for legal quests: readable faces, believable offices/courtrooms, neutral palette.
templates.base_prompt: professional corporate photography, realistic, clean composition, neutral color palette, modern law office, courtroom atmosphere, natural skin texture, soft light, sharp focus, no fantasy
templates.negative_prompt: anime, cartoon, illustration, fantasy, sci-fi, medieval, low quality, blurry, noisy, watermark, logo, text, letters, signature, extra fingers, extra limbs, deformed hands, bad anatomy, duplicate face, multiple people, crowd

style_metadata.identity_notes: Use character reference images (portrait/full_front) for consistent identity across variants. If your ComfyUI has IP-Adapter, set ip_adapter_enabled in pipeline profiles for stronger identity lock.

templates.name: Legal • Clean Editorial Illustration
templates.description: Clean editorial illustration (friendly UI). Use for lighter tone quests and diagrams.
templates.base_prompt: clean editorial illustration, crisp lines, simple shading, minimal clutter, readable silhouettes, professional, legal theme, courtroom, law office
templates.negative_prompt: photorealistic, heavy grain, messy lines, sketchy, noisy, watermark, logo, text, letters, extra fingers, deformed hands, bad anatomy

templates.name: Legal • Noir Investigation
templates.description: Cinematic noir (moody). Useful for detective/legal drama quests.
templates.base_prompt: cinematic noir, high contrast, moody shadows, dramatic rim light, film still, legal drama, investigation board, night city rain, believable faces
templates.negative_prompt: bright cheerful, pastel, cartoon, anime, fantasy, sci-fi, watermark, logo, text, letters, extra fingers, deformed hands, bad anatomy, duplicate face

templates.name: Legal • Document / Evidence (Clean)
templates.description: For artifacts like documents/evidence photos. Clean, readable, minimal distractions.
templates.base_prompt: clean documentation photo, white background, top-down, neatly arranged, evidence photo style, realistic paper texture, sharp readable shapes
templates.negative_prompt: handwriting, text, letters, watermark, logo, messy background, clutter, low quality, blurry, noisy
